svg.text: McCzarny recently focused on enhancing his
projects. In ghsummary, he implemented basic
Markdown formatting support for SVG output,
including bold, italic, and inline code,
updating associated fixtures and tests. For
chromium-daily-digest, he enabled dynamic
favicon and logo changes to signal new content
availability. He also improved summary
generation by adding support for relative day
numbers and resolved a regex escaping bug in
generate-page.ts. On the flexible-log-analyzer
VS Code extension, he introduced a new workflow
to publish it to the Open VSX Registry. He
bumped the extension's package version to
0.3.11 and updated various project
dependencies. This also involved lowering the
VS Code engine version requirement for broader
compatibility. Furthermore, he addressed
potential CodeQL alerts by explicitly adding
workflow permissions and configured publishing
to trigger only on version tags, not
development branches.
Generated on: Sun Jul 19 03:19:59 2026
